metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for the Harmonius game engine.

plugins.description: Markdown linting and formatting via rumdl: LSP server, PostToolUse fmt hook, and the markdown coding-standard skill.
plugins.name: rumdl

plugins.description: Development workflow with coding standards, document templates, and supervisor agents for the full ideate-design-implement-release lifecycle. Depends on the rumdl plugin.
plugins.name: harmonize

plugins.description: Interactive multi-machine PR dispatch orchestrator. Uses GitHub Project v2 item locks (lock_owner, lock_expires_at) and blocked-by relationships so orchestrators on different machines coordinate without shared filesystem. Dispatches up to 3 worker teammates per orchestrator via agent teams.
plugins.name: coordinator
